name: Cinder Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Frozen non-dairy whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: St. Louis Post-Dispatch 1/1/1990
Crush the cookies in a large plastic bag using a rolling pin or food processor. Mix crushed cookies with melted butter. Measure out 3/4 cup and set aside.
Press remaining cookie mixture evenly into an ungreased 9-by-13-inch pan to form the bottom layer of the cake.
Spread softened ice cream over the cookie layer.
Spread whipped topping over the ice cream.
Sprinkle pecans over the whipped topping.
Drizzle chocolate syrup over all.
Sprinkle reserved 3/4 cup cookie mixture over the syrup.
Freeze. After the cake has been in the freezer for 2 to 3 hours and is beginning to firm up, cover the pan with foil.
For best texture, assemble and freeze the cake 2 days in advance.
To serve, simply cut into squares and enjoy. This is very rich, so large pieces aren't needed when serving.
